events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, born Richard Starkey in Liverpool in 1940.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six years young! Ringo Starr, the legendary beat behind The Beatles, is celebrating his birthday. What's your favourite Fab Four track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today, born in Hampton, Middlesex in 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! From stadium-rocking anthems to astrophysics, what an incredible life. Which Queen guitar solo is your absolute favourite?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born in Dartford, Kent in 1943.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding stages worldwide! Happy birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger. What's your top Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in the US
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV officially launched in the United States, famously playing The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever by launching with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill radio, or just make it better?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on this day in 1994, propelling the Manchester band to stardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track from this iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair began on this day in 1969, bringing '3 Days of Peace & Music' to half a million people in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, Woodstock kicked off three days that defined a generation. An iconic festival of peace, music, and mud. What performances do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who died at his Graceland home in 1977 at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost the King, Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to inspire. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Rapper Tupac Shakur died on this day in 1996, six days after being critically wounded in a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who tragically passed away on this day in 1996. His influence on music and culture remains undeniable. What's your most played Tupac track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away in London in 1970 at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Fifty-six years on, the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix is still revered. A true guitar icon whose music continues to electrify. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on this day in the UK in 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks! Which song from it is your timeless favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today, born in Akron, Ohio in 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the brilliant Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and attitude have inspired generations. What's your top Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today, born in Manchester in 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite tune featuring that unmistakable voice?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic solo single 'Imagine' was released on this day in the US in 1971, becoming one of his most beloved songs.

angles.name: Imagine Release Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how people listened to music on the go.

angles.name: iPod Revolution
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, Apple introduced the iPod and changed our music habits forever. Remember loading up your first one? What was on your ultimate playlist?

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the 1962 premiere of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No'.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy Global James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred, naturally) to 007. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the best theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder John Lennon, born in Liverpool in 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message of peace live on. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
